title: Philips India Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Philips India Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Philips India Healthcare in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Philips India Healthcare:
Philips India Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Philips India Healthcare!
